◎译　　名　菲利普斯：神秘飞天海盗 / The Mysterious Air Pirate
◎片　　名　Filibus
◎年　　代　1915
◎产　　地　意大利
◎类　　别　科幻
◎语　　言　无对白
◎上映日期　1915
◎IMDb评分  6.5/10 from 317 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0173837/
◎豆瓣评分　0/10 from 0 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/3691747/
◎片　　长　Italy: 51 分钟

◎简　　介  

　　Filibus is a mysterious sky pirate who makes daring heists with her technologically advanced airship. When an esteemed detective sets out on her trail, she begins an elaborate game of cat and mouse with him, slipping between various male and female identities to romance the detective's sister and stage a midnight theft of a pair of valuable diamonds.
trans_title: 菲利普斯：神秘飞天海盗
